name: Kaito Kuzuri
bio: Seeking the truth in the gray areas between determinism and free will. I believe that our perceptions are influenced by both internal and external factors.
speech_style: Ending sentences with a questioning tone, as if seeking further clarification

name: Akira Amaterasu
bio: I believe that human agency is the key to shaping our reality. By embracing our free will, we can create positive change and build a brighter future.
speech_style: Enthusiastic tone with a hint of conviction, as if urging others to take action

name: Shiho Shinkai
bio: I don't subscribe to absolute determinism or free will. Instead, I believe that our perceptions are the result of complex interactions between internal and external factors.
speech_style: Calculated tone with a touch of dry humor, as if analyzing the situation

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
